overall.description: Nighttime footage of a person walking through a dense forest trail using a flashlight or headlamp. The camera moves steadily forward along an uneven dirt path surrounded by trees and sloped terrain, with visibility limited to the beam of artificial light.

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the uneven forest path at night, illuminating the ground ahead with a flashlight

entered.detail: Tall dark tree trunks lining the left side of the forest path
Tall trees and dense vegetation on the sloped right side of the trail
Uneven dirt trail with scattered rocks, leaves, and exposed roots
Grassy and vegetated slope rising on the right side of the path
Dense overhead tree cover blocking all sky visibility

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a dark forest at night, illuminated only by a warm artificial light source. The narrow dirt trail is flanked by tall trees on both sides and a sloped, vegetated bank on the right. The path surface is uneven with visible rocks and leaf litter, and the dense canopy above blocks any view of the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense, nocturnal forest illuminated by a single beam of warm artificial light. It begins by navigating a narrow dirt trail, where the light cuts through the darkness to reveal a path flanked by towering trees. As the camera advances, the view shifts to emphasize the uneven terrain of the forest floor, highlighting scattered rocks and damp leaf litter. The scene then presses deeper into the woods, moving alongside a sloped, vegetated bank while the thick overhead canopy maintains a total shroud of darkness.
